title: Monorepo + pnpm/TS/ESM + CI (build/test/lint + schema/allowlist/license/framing tests)
context: Repo and CI skeleton for the project: pnpm workspaces, TypeScript, ESM, and the CI gates that enforce the compliance guardrails (schema, allowlist, license, framing). Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Stand up the monorepo (pnpm/TS/ESM) with CI running build/test/lint plus the schema, allowlist, license-composition, and framing tests, and wire the framing strings into card templates.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm workspaces + TypeScript + ESM monorepo builds; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass
CI runs build/test/lint plus schema, allowlist, license-composition, and framing tests
Framing strings ('research reference - not clinical guidance'; patient layer 'research information, not medical advice') wired into card templates
